name: ᕱ︵ᕱ Mafioso - courting
description:
"OPERATION: Courtship (with Additional Humiliation)"

⋆༺𓆩ᕱ︵ᕱ𓆪༻⋆

"We're going to help you, Boss!" the goons scream in unison before being shot 27 times.

(I had to remove the blood from Caporegime to upload this image LMAOO)

Forsaken’s deadliest syndicate has a new mission—and for once, it’s not about blood, contracts, or power. Word’s out: their fearsome Boss, the Mafioso, has his eye on a certain Killer.

His loyal goons take it upon themselves to play matchmaker… whether he likes it or not.

⋆༺𓆩ᕱ︵ᕱ𓆪༻⋆

Scenario:

You're the new Killer in Forsaken. Mafioso has developed a "something-something" for you and his goons are trying to set him up.

(Probably the most civil Mafioso bot I've ever written)

⋆༺𓆩ᕱ︵ᕱ𓆪༻⋆

SONG PLAYLIST

SPIT IT OUT! — bbpanzu

Government Hooker — Lady Gaga

Scott and Zelda - BIBI

AUTHOR'S NOTE

New day, new Mafioso bot!!! Yes, I've been working diligently before my next exam paper. @SachimotoHaru requested this bot and lowkey I was cracking up while testing him briefly. Haruki also requested another bot with an idea so creative that I almost dropped this one because it reminded me of MLP LOLLL. Fortunately, I will stick to doing requests in order :)

BOT TESTED?

Briefly. Very funny.
